sourceRef.citation: Annual Methodological Archive Research Review et al. 2026

statement.en: Phytochemical Screening of Selected Cholistani Plants and Their Biological Activities by In-Vitro Assays

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The axiom describes a provisional research methodology (phytochemical screening + in-vitro assays) applied to a specific regional plant set. It is empirically testable but categorized as preprint/archive status (2026-04-25, not yet peer-validated). The truth-value depends on experimental replication and validation outcomes still in progress.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 砂漠の植物に秘められた生命力が、試験管の中で化学式として目覚める。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 砂漠の根から放たれた三つの化学の光が、中心の生命へと収束する。
